Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: art (discipline) [300054138], visual arts (discipline) [300054154], arts (broad discipline) [300175240], arts and related disciplines [300054137], humanities [300054136], disciplines (concept) [300054135], Disciplines (hierarchy name) [300054134], Activities Facet [300264090]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: discipline-based art education [300263177], art education [300174155], education by subject [300185632], education [300054360], social sciences [300054314], disciplines (concept) [300054135], Disciplines (hierarchy name) [300054134], Activities Facet [300264090]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: The discipline concerning works that are primarily utilitarian in form or function, but that have aesthetic value provided by the design, decoration, or embellishment, such as ceramics, furniture, textiles, glass, and others.

Designación tradicional occidental para aquellas artes que abarcan la creación de objetos que sirven a propósitos tanto utilitarios como estéticos o que abarcan la decoración y embellecimiento de objetos utilitarios.

Verwijst naar werken die op de eerste plaats gebruiksvoorwerpen zijn door hun vorm of functie, maar die een esthetische waarde bezitten als gevolg van het ontwerp of decoraties en versieringen. Het betreft onder meer keramiek, meubilair en andere huishoudelijke voorwerpen of gebruiksvoorwerpen.
指在形式上或功能上著重實際效益的作品，然經由設計、裝潢或裝飾可賦予美學價值。裝飾藝術可包括陶瓷、家具及其他家用品或實用的物件。裝飾藝術與「美術」並不相同，傳統上認為純藝術需要更為廣泛的訓練，且受限於繪畫、雕塑、素描和建築等表現方式。

Attività artistiche e prodotti che, anche rivalutando tecniche artigiane, intendono conferire una validità artistica a oggetti di uso comune, (es. oreficeria, ebanisteria, arazzi, argenti, smalti ecc.)
